name: The Rook
overview: After waking in a park with total amnesia — and surrounded by dead bodies, all wearing latex gloves — a young woman must fight to uncover her past, and resume her position at the head of Britain’s most secret (supernatural) service before the traitors who stole her memory can finish what they started.

trailers.title: The Rook Trailer (HD) Olivia Munn Supernatural Spy Thriller Series
